title: News update on Eva 30 website
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] News update on Eva 3.0 website             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sun Jan 27, 2013 2:56 am Not sure what this is about, since I don't have an accurate translation, but it mentions the fourth movie in distribution, probably the last film, and some other things. Can anybody tell me what this is about? http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/news_det.cgi?news_c=11289

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Jan 27, 2013 3:12 am It's talking about the fourth postcard that's getting released like what we got with Shikinami, Makinami, and Kaworu/Shinji. This one is going to be featuring tenative name: Rei Ayanami. Nothing on 4.0 though.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Jan 27, 2013 3:23 am hmmmm.....it says something about postcards, dunno. But i don't think it says anything about final film.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jan 27, 2013 5:26 am Na7e wrote: It's talking about the fourth postcard that's getting released like what we got with Shikinami, Makinami, and Kaworu/Shinji. This one is going to be featuring tenative name: Rei Ayanami. Nothing on 4.0 though.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:04 pm Now if she'll just get an actual name.
